description: x402 ad recommendations, intent analytics, and machine-commerce demand reports.
name: io.github.forgemeshlabs/x402-ads-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional dedicated low-balance Base wallet private key for settling paid x402 analytics calls. Without it, paid tools return the x402 payment challenge instead of settling.
environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional publisher key from ads.forgemesh.io. Makes get_intent_report free for your registered services.
environmentVariables.name: X402_ADS_PUBLISHER_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional intent network base URL. Defaults to https://ads.forgemesh.io.
environmentVariables.name: X402_ADS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional Base mainnet RPC URL. Defaults to https://mainnet.base.org.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_RPC_URL
